title: Outgoing President Obstructs Electoral Certification and Transition
description: The Electoral Commission certifies the election result and the President-elect. The outgoing President refuses to cooperate with the constitutionally required transition, denying security briefings and agency access, in violation of Article III Section 13 and the anti-subversion provisions of Article VI Section 1. The Accountability Commission opens an investigation. The transition proceeds under the constitutional mandate regardless of the outgoing President's obstruction.
